app.name: CommitCat
app.one_liner: A cross-platform desktop pet that tracks developer activity like Git commits, IDE usage, and focus sessions, rewarding progress with pixel-art animations, XP, and AI chat.

screens.name: Desktop Pet
screens.purpose: Display an interactive pixel-art cat that responds to developer activity and provides visual feedback.
primary_actions: Click to trigger speech bubble reactions
Double-click to open Claude AI chat
Right-click to access context menu (Today summary, Settings)

screens.name: Settings Panel
screens.purpose: Configure watched repositories, cat appearance, timer durations, API keys, and view XP progress.
primary_actions: Enter Anthropic API key for AI chat

rust_commands.name: detect_ide_activity
rust_commands.purpose: Monitor running IDE processes (VS Code, JetBrains, Xcode) to determine active coding sessions.

rust_commands.name: fetch_github_events
rust_commands.purpose: Poll GitHub for PR merges, stars, and other events to notify the user and grant XP.

rust_commands.name: send_claude_message
rust_commands.purpose: Forward user input to Anthropic's Claude API and return response for AI chat feature.

rust_commands.name: start_pomodoro_timer
rust_commands.purpose: Initiate a focus session with configurable duration and break intervals.

rust_commands.name: track_git_commit
rust_commands.purpose: Detect and record local Git commits to trigger cat reactions and award XP.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add basic Git commit detection and reaction animation
week 1: Implement draggable, click-through desktop cat with idle/sleep states
week 1: Integrate system tray icon with streak tooltip
week 2: Add Pomodoro timer with start/pause controls
week 2: Build settings panel for repo watching and cat color selection
week 2: Implement XP and level system tied to commit frequency
week 3: Develop VS Code and JetBrains plugin integration for coding time tracking
week 3: Integrate Claude AI chat via double-click
acceptance_tests: After making a Git commit in a watched repo, the cat displays a celebration animation and speech bubble.
Double-clicking the cat opens a chat window that sends messages to Claude API and displays responses.
During a Pomodoro focus session, the cat remains awake and shows a focused expression; after completion, XP is awarded.
On macOS Apple Silicon, user can install via .dmg and bypass security warning using xattr command.
Right-clicking shows 'Today' option that displays timeline of commits, coding time, and XP earned.
